name: JarmScan
description: JarmScan schema from Asset Graph API

cipher_and_version_fingerprint.description: The first 30 character portion of the Jarm fingerprint.

fingerprint.description: The 62 character Jarm fingerprint of the service.

scan_time.description: The time the service was fingerprinted

tls_extensions_sha256.description: The second 32 character portion of the Jarm fingerprint
